_comment: IMPORTANT: only entries marked verified:true have been cross-checked against a public source during this build (see 'source' field). All other entries are structural placeholders with real institution names but UNVERIFIED contact details, and MUST be confirmed directly with NDA Zimbabwe / MoHCC / the institution before this goes live. Publishing a wrong crisis phone number is a real safety risk — do not skip this step. The admin Resource Manager (see /admin) lets an NGO partner correct and expand this list without a redeploy.

helplines.name: Childline Zimbabwe
helplines.audience: Children and youth (0-18, widely used beyond that too)

helplines.name: National Drug Authority (NDA) Zimbabwe
helplines.phone: VERIFY_WITH_NDA — no publicly verifiable toll-free number found during this build; confirm directly with NDA Zimbabwe head office before publishing

helplines.name: Friendship Bench Zimbabwe
helplines.audience: General public — community-based talk therapy ("Grandmother/Grandfather" lay counsellors)
helplines.phone: VERIFY_WITH_ORG — public sources list an email (info@friendshipbench.io) and Harare office address, not a hotline number; confirm a phone/WhatsApp line with the organisation directly

helplines.name: Zimbabwe Emergency Services
helplines.source: Widely cited as Zimbabwe's general emergency numbers; confirm current routing with local telco before launch

_todo_before_pilot: Replace all VERIFY_* placeholders with confirmed numbers from NDA Zimbabwe, MoHCC and each facility directly.
Expand the facilities list to the full target of ~30 sites across all provinces with an NDA/CIDAZ partner, matching the settlement-type distribution used in Section 1 of the proposal.
Add GeoJSON coordinates once the verified list is finalised, for the resource-map view.
